$MELI uses AI to lower costs and increase profits. According to Mercado Pago COO Arregui, AI now resolves most customer service queries for 70M+ users. Inside the app, an AI personal banker automates bill payments to keep users locked into the ecosystem. Outside the app, a new super token lowers fraud and improves approval rates for guest checkouts. Eventually, the company plans to sell these AI financial tools to other businesses across Latin America. That is kind of... HUGE 🤣

Mercado Pago is actively transitioning from a consumer wallet into a B2B fintech provider. The company is already packaging and selling its AI-backed fintech services to other businesses. This includes providing external merchants with AI-driven underwriting for credit, automated seller assistants, and AI checkout tools to optimize their own financial operations across the LatAm region.

No es una estafa legal: el precio que ves es el que pagás al comprar, sin engaño posterior. Se llama pricing personalizado/dinámico, usa algoritmos con tus datos (historial, Mercado Pago, dispositivo) para estimar cuánto estás dispuesto a pagar. Común en Amazon y e-commerce global.

En Argentina, Ley 24.240 exige info clara sobre precio y condiciones (arts. 4 y 10), pero no lo prohíbe. Podés denunciar en Defensa del Consumidor local/nacional, aunque es improbable que prospere como "estafa".

Tip: modo incógnito o borrar cookies suele mostrar el precio más bajo.

This interview with $MELI's COO of Pago reveals some really interesting insights on the recent problems they are solving. Mercado Pago is leveraging its massive existing database of tokenized cards to solve the worst performing segment of online payments, which is guest checkouts. By pairing this database with FIDO biometric authentication, they are building a portable, frictionless payment layer that follows the user across the internet, solidifying their dominance in the LatAm digital payments sector.

A lot of their innovation comes back to focusing on the customer. Locking the customer into their ecosystem provides so much LTV that even improving friction points like these are incredibly valuable.
